Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************

 The cleaving associated to a display map bicategories

 Every display map bicategory gives rise to a cleaving. If the display map
 bicategory is covariant, then the associated cleaving has a local opcleaving.
 If the display map bicategory is contravariant, then so is the associated
 cleaving has a local cleaving.

 1. Pullback squares are cartesian 1-cells
 2. Global cleaving
 3. Characterization of cartesian cells
 4. Characterization of opcartesian cells
 5. Local cleaving
 6. Local opcleaving
 7. Specialized to internal Street (op)fibrations

 *****************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Logic.DisplayMapBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.CleavingOfBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.DisplayMapBicatToDispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.

Local Open Scope cat.


B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
local_iso_cleaving (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D)


B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
local_iso_cleaving (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D)

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
∑ ff : hx -->[ f] hy, disp_invertible_2cell α ff hf

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
hx -->[ f] hy
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
(λ ff : hx -->[ f] hy, disp_invertible_2cell α ff hf)
  ?pr1

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
hx -->[ f] hy
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (pr1 hf · pr12 hy)

    exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                _
                α)
             (pr22 hf)).
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
(λ ff : hx -->[ f] hy, disp_invertible_2cell α ff hf)
  (pr1 hf,,
   pr12 hf,,
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) α)
      (pr22 hf)
    :
    invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (pr1 hf · pr12 hy)))
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
((pr12 hx ◃ α) • pr22 hf) • (id₂ (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ α) • pr122 hf
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_disp_invertible_2cell α (id₂ (pr1 hf),, ?Goal)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
((pr12 hx ◃ α) • pr22 hf) • (id₂ (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ α) • pr122 hf
 abstract
        (rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_disp_invertible_2cell α
  (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
   arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving_subproof B D x y
     f g hx hy hf α)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
      arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving_subproof B D x
        y f g hx hy hf α))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (pr1 hf))

      is_iso.
Defined.

Section DispMapBicatCleaving.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (D : disp_map_bicat B).

  Let DD : disp_bicat B := disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D.

  (**
   1. Pullback squares are cartesian 1-cells
   *)
  Section PullbackToCartesian.
    Context {pb x y z : B}
            {f : y --> z}
            {g : x --> z}
            (p₁ : pb --> x)
            (p₂ : pb --> y)
            (Hp₂ : pred_ob D p₂)
            (Hg : pred_ob D g)
            (Hp₁ : pred_mor D p₂ g p₁)
            (γ : invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f) )
            (cone := make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂  γ)
            (Hpb : has_pb_ump cone).

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
DD y

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧

p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
DD y

pred_ob D p₂
 exact Hp₂.
    Defined.

 exact Hg.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hy -->[ f] hz

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hy -->[ f] hz

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
B ⟦ pr1 hy, pr1 hz ⟧
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
pred_mor D (pr12 hy) (pr12 hz) ?f
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
invertible_2cell (pr12 hy · f) (?f · pr12 hz)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
B ⟦ pr1 hy, pr1 hz ⟧
 exact p₁.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
pred_mor D (pr12 hy) (pr12 hz) p₁
 exact Hp₁.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
invertible_2cell (pr12 hy · f) (p₁ · pr12 hz)
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ).
    Defined.

    Section LiftOneCellFactor.
      Context {c : B}
              {cc : DD c}
              {k : B ⟦ c, y ⟧}
              (gg : cc -->[ k · f ] hz).

      Let other_cone : pb_cone g f
        := make_pb_cone
             (pr1 cc)
             (pr1 gg)
             (pr12 cc · k)
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)).

      Let φ : pb_1cell other_cone cone
        := has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone.

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg

 pr122 (?pr1 ;; hf)%mor_disp • (α ▹ pr12 hz) =
 (pr12 cc ◃ id2_invertible_2cell (k · f)) • pr122 gg)
  ?pr10
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B

Hg: pred_ob D g

γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)

hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
(λ x0 : ?pr1 ;; hf ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (k · f)] gg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (id2_invertible_2cell (k · f)) x0) 
  (?pr10,, ?pr2)

Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))

B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
 exact (pb_1cell_1cell φ).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
pred_mor D (pr12 cc) (pr12 hy) φ
 exact (pred_mor_closed_under_pb_ump_mor
                     D
                     _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
                     Hpb
                     other_cone
                     _ _ _ _ _
                     Hg
                     Hp₁
                     (pr12 gg)).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · k) (φ · pr12 hy)
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr2 φ)).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor D k φ
     (pred_mor_closed_under_pb_ump_mor D pb x y z g f
        p₁ p₂ γ Hpb other_cone c (pr1 gg) (pr12 cc) k
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 cc) k f))
        Hg Hp₁ (pr12 gg))
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr2 φ)) ;; hf)%mor_disp ==>
pr1 gg
 exact (pb_1cell_pr1 φ).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
(λ α : pr1
         (make_disp_map_bicat_mor D k φ
            (pred_mor_closed_under_pb_ump_mor D pb x y
               z g f p₁ p₂ γ Hpb other_cone c (pr1 gg)
               (pr12 cc) k
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
                  (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (pr12 cc) k f)) Hg Hp₁ (pr12 gg))
            (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr2 φ)) ;; hf)%mor_disp ==>
       pr1 gg,
 pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor D k φ
          (pred_mor_closed_under_pb_ump_mor D pb x y z
             g f p₁ p₂ γ Hpb other_cone c (pr1 gg)
             (pr12 cc) k
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                   (pr12 cc) k f)) Hg Hp₁ (pr12 gg))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr2 φ)) ;; hf)%mor_disp
 • (α ▹ pr12 hz) =
 (pr12 cc ◃ id2_invertible_2cell (k · f)) • pr122 gg)
  (pb_1cell_pr1 φ)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             pose (pb_1cell_eq φ) as q ;
             cbn in q ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 4 (use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn) ;
             rewrite q ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             refine (!_) ;
             etrans ;
             [ do 4 apply maponpaths ;
               rewrite !vassocr ;
               rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
               rewrite id2_left ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               apply idpath
             | ] ;
             etrans ;
             [ do 3 apply maponpaths ;
               rewrite !vassocr ;
               rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
               rewrite vcomp_linv ;
               rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_left ;
               apply idpath
             | ] ;
             etrans ;
             [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
               rewrite !vassocr ;
               rewrite lassociator_rassociator, id2_left ;
               apply idpath
             | ] ;
             rewrite vcomp_linv ;
             apply id2_right).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
(λ x0 : make_disp_map_bicat_mor D k φ
          (pred_mor_closed_under_pb_ump_mor D pb x y z
             g f p₁ p₂ γ Hpb other_cone c (pr1 gg)
             (pr12 cc) k
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                   (pr12 cc) k f)) Hg Hp₁ (pr12 gg))
          (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr2 φ)) ;; hf ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (k · f)] gg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (id2_invertible_2cell (k · f)) x0)
  (pb_1cell_pr1 φ,, pb_lift_1cell_factor_subproof)
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
k: B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ k · f] hz
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 cc) (pr1 gg)
  (pr12 cc · k)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 gg))
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 cc) k f)): pb_cone g f
φ:= has_pb_ump_1 Hpb other_cone: pb_1cell other_cone cone
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (pb_1cell_pr1 φ,, pb_lift_1cell_factor_subproof))

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      Defined.
    End LiftOneCellFactor.

    Section LiftTwoCellFactor.
      Context {c : B}
              {cc : DD c}
              {h h' : c --> y}
              {gg : cc -->[ h · f ] hz}
              {gg' : cc -->[ h' · f ] hz}
              {δ : h ==> h'}
              (σσ : disp_2cells (δ ▹ f) gg gg')
              (Lh : lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg)
              (Lh' : lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg').

      Let ℓ : pr1 cc --> pr1 hy := pr11 Lh.
      Let ℓp₂ : invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)  := pr221 Lh.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)

D: disp_map_bicat B

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧

gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)

D: disp_map_bicat B

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
is_invertible_2cell ?η

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓ · p₁ ==> pr1 gg
 exact (pr112 Lh).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
is_invertible_2cell (pr112 Lh)
 apply (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible _ _ _ (pr22 Lh)).
      Defined.

      Let ℓ' : pr1 cc --> pb := pr11 Lh'.
      Let ℓ'p₂ : invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂) := pr221 Lh'.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ' · p₁ ==> pr1 gg'
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
is_invertible_2cell ?η

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ' · p₁ ==> pr1 gg'
 exact (pr112 Lh').
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B

pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧

p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
is_invertible_2cell (pr112 Lh')
 apply (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible _ _ _ (pr22 Lh')).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D

 pr122 (pr1 Lh ;; hf)%mor_disp • (α ▹ pr12 hz) =
 (pr12 cc ◃ id2_invertible_2cell (h · f))
 • pr122 gg) (pr112 Lh)
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)

 • pr122 gg') (pr112 Lh')

 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d:= pr212 Lh: (λ α : pr1 (pr1 Lh ;; hf)%mor_disp ==> pr1 gg,
 pr122 (pr1 Lh ;; hf)%mor_disp • (α ▹ pr12 hz) =
 (pr12 cc ◃ id2_invertible_2cell (h · f))
 • pr122 gg) (pr112 Lh)
d':= pr212 Lh': (λ α : pr1 (pr1 Lh' ;; hf)%mor_disp ==> pr1 gg',
 pr122 (pr1 Lh' ;; hf)%mor_disp • (α ▹ pr12 hz) =
 (pr12 cc ◃ id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f))
 • pr122 gg') (pr112 Lh')
d'':= pr2 σσ: (λ α : pr1 gg ==> pr1 gg',
 pr122 gg • (α ▹ pr12 hz) =
 (pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg') 
  (pr1 σσ)
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d:= pr212 Lh: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ id₂ (h · f)) • pr122 gg
d':= pr212 Lh': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ id₂ (h' · f)) • pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g

γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

δ: h ==> h'

ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d':= pr212 Lh': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ id₂ (h' · f)) • pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ ▹ g) • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (ℓ'p₁ ^-1 ▹ g)))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 ▹ f) • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)) • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
lassociator ℓ p₁ g
• ((ℓp₁ ▹ g)
   • ((pr1 σσ ▹ g)
      • ((ℓ'p₁ ^-1 ▹ g)
         • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ))))) =
(ℓ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator ℓ p₂ f
   • ((ℓp₂ ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
         • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f))))

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
?Hε ^-1
• (lassociator ℓ p₁ g
   • ((ℓp₁ ▹ g)
      • ((pr1 σσ ▹ g)
         • ((ℓ'p₁ ^-1 ▹ g)
            • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ)))))) =
lassociator ℓ p₂ f
• ((ℓp₂ ^-1 ▹ f)
   • (((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
      • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f)))

 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)

          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
is_invertible_2cell γ

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ℓ γ) ^-1
• (lassociator ℓ p₁ g
   • ((ℓp₁ ▹ g)
      • ((pr1 σσ ▹ g)
         • ((ℓ'p₁ ^-1 ▹ g)
            • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ)))))) =
lassociator ℓ p₂ f
• ((ℓp₂ ^-1 ▹ f)
   • (((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
      • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f)))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(ℓ ◃ γ ^-1)
• (lassociator ℓ p₁ g
   • ((pr112 Lh ▹ g)
      • ((pr1 σσ ▹ g)
         • ((pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)
            • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ)))))) =
lassociator ℓ p₂ f
• ((ℓp₂ ^-1 ▹ f)
   • (((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
      • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f)))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(ℓp₂ ▹ f)
• (rassociator ℓ p₂ f
   • ((ℓ ◃ γ ^-1)
      • (lassociator ℓ p₁ g
         • ((pr112 Lh ▹ g)
            • ((pr1 σσ ▹ g)
               • ((pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)
                  • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ)))))))) =
((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
• ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
• ((ℓp₂ ▹ f)
   • (rassociator ℓ p₂ f
      • ((ℓ ◃ γ ^-1)
         • (lassociator ℓ p₁ g
            • ((pr112 Lh ▹ g)
               • ((pr1 σσ ▹ g)
                  • ((pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)
                     • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ))))))))) =
lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
• (((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
   • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: (lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
 • ((pr221 Lh ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((((((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (ℓp₂ ▹ f))
       • rassociator ℓ p₂ f) • (ℓ ◃ γ ^-1))
     • lassociator ℓ p₁ g) • (pr112 Lh ▹ g))
   • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
 • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr221 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g) • 
(pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((((((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (ℓp₂ ▹ f))
       • rassociator ℓ p₂ f) • (ℓ ◃ γ ^-1))
     • lassociator ℓ p₁ g) • (pr112 Lh ▹ g))
   • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
 • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr221 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g) • 
(pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((((((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (ℓp₂ ▹ f))
       • rassociator ℓ p₂ f) • (ℓ ◃ γ ^-1))
     • lassociator ℓ p₁ g) • (pr112 Lh ▹ g))
   • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr221 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g) • 
(pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
?b =
((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
 • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr221 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g) • 
(pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((((((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (ℓp₂ ▹ f))
       • rassociator ℓ p₂ f) • (ℓ ◃ γ ^-1))
     • lassociator ℓ p₁ g) • (pr112 Lh ▹ g))
   • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) = ?b

          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr221 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g) • 
(pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (ℓp₂ ▹ f))
   • rassociator ℓ p₂ f) • (ℓ ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator ℓ p₁ g) • (pr112 Lh ▹ g) = ?y'

          exact d.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr221 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) p₂ f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) p₁ g) • 
(pr112 Lh ▹ g) = pr122 gg
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(((pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
 • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
d'':= pr2 σσ: pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g) =
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg'
(((pr122 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ g)) • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
 • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
((((pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr122 gg')
  • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)) • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g)
• (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
((lassociator (pr12 cc) h f • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
 • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
(pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
• (pr122 gg'
   • ((pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)
      • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ)))) =
lassociator (pr12 cc) h f
• (((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
   • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
rassociator (pr12 cc) h f
• ((pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
   • (pr122 gg'
      • ((pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)
         • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ))))) =
((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)
• ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
d': (lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) = pr122 gg'
((((rassociator (pr12 cc) h f • (pr12 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)))
   • pr122 gg') • (pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ) =
(((pr12 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f) • (ℓ'p₂ ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f
