     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
is_invertible_2cell
  ((pr112 (pr2 Lh') ▹ g)
   • (rassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (ℓ' ◃ γ)))

          is_iso ;
            [ apply (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr2 ℓ'p₁))
            | apply property_from_invertible_2cell ].
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) =
(lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f))
• (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr2 ℓ'p₁)))
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator ℓ' p₁ g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ℓ' γ))) ^-1

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
    • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
       • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
          • lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g))))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ g) =
(lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
 • ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f) • rassociator ℓ' p₂ f))
• (((ℓ' ◃ γ ^-1) • lassociator ℓ' p₁ g)
   • (pr112 Lh' ▹ g))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
• ((pr221 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') p₂ f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ γ ^-1)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') p₁ g
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ g))))) =
lassociator (pr12 cc) h' f
• ((ℓ'p₂ ▹ f)
   • (rassociator ℓ' p₂ f
      • ((ℓ' ◃ γ ^-1)
         • (lassociator ℓ' p₁ g • (pr112 Lh' ▹ g)))))

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f) • (?Goal0 ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g • (?Goal ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • 
(ℓ' ◃ γ)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧

Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
ℓ · p₁ ==> ℓ' · p₁
 exact (ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ • ℓ'p₁^-1).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧

gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)

ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
ℓ · p₂ ==> ℓ' · p₂
 exact (ℓp₂^-1 • (_ ◃ δ) • ℓ'p₂).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(((ℓ ◃ γ) • lassociator ℓ p₂ f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator ℓ' p₂ f =
((lassociator ℓ p₁ g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator ℓ' p₁ g) • (ℓ' ◃ γ)
 exact pb_lift_2cell_factor_cell_eq.
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
isaprop (lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh')

δ: h ==> h'

D: disp_map_bicat B

pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
isProofIrrelevant
  (lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh')

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
φ₁ = φ₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
isPredicate
  (λ x : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
   transportf
     (λ z0 : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; hf ==>[ z0] gg')
     (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
     ((x ▹▹ hf)
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh') =
   disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh •• σσ)

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')

pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
isPredicate
  (λ x : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
   transportf
     (λ z0 : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; hf ==>[ z0] gg')
     (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
     ((x ▹▹ hf)
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh') =
   disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh •• σσ)

          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
x0: Lh ==>[ δ] Lh'
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; hf ==>[ z0] gg')
     (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
     ((x0 ▹▹ hf)
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh') =
   disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh •• σσ)

          apply disp_cellset_property.

D: disp_map_bicat B

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 Lh ==> pr1 Lh',
   pr122 Lh • (x ▹ pr12 hy) =
   (pr12 cc ◃ δ) • pr122 Lh')
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)

ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 Lh ==> pr1 Lh',
   pr122 Lh • (x ▹ pr12 hy) =
   (pr12 cc ◃ δ) • pr122 Lh')

          intro ; apply cellset_property.

DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
(((pr1 Lh ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)
  • lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) f)
 • (?β ▹ f))
• rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr2 cone) f =
((lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) g • (?α ▹ g))
 • rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr1 cone) g)
• (pr1 Lh' ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')

pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone = ?α

δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone = ?β

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
pr1 Lh · pb_cone_pr1 cone ==>
pr1 Lh' · pb_cone_pr1 cone
 exact (ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ • ℓ'p₁^-1).

pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)

hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'

ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D

     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')

pr1 Lh · pb_cone_pr2 cone ==>
pr1 Lh' · pb_cone_pr2 cone
 exact (ℓp₂^-1 • (_ ◃ δ) • ℓ'p₂).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
(((pr1 Lh ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)
  • lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) f)
 • (((ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂) ▹ f))
• rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr2 cone) f =
((lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) g
  • (((ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1) ▹ g))
 • rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr1 cone) g)
• (pr1 Lh' ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)
 apply pb_lift_2cell_factor_cell_eq.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone = (ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ) • ℓ'p₁ ^-1
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
(pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone)
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓ'p₁) ^-1 = ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ

          exact (!(transportf_disp_map_bicat_cell _ _ _) @ maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁)).

D: disp_map_bicat B

f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧

γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧

gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D

(ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')

pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone =
ℓp₂ ^-1 • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) • ℓ'p₂)

D: disp_map_bicat B

pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧

(is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓp₂) ^-1
• (pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone) = (pr12 cc ◃ δ) • ℓ'p₂

          exact (pr21 φ₁).

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
(pr11 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone)
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓ'p₁) ^-1 = ℓp₁ • pr1 σσ

          exact (!(transportf_disp_map_bicat_cell _ _ _) @ maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂)).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone =
(ℓp₂ ^-1 • (pr12 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓ'p₂
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone =
ℓp₂ ^-1 • ((pr12 cc ◃ δ) • ℓ'p₂)

          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
(is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓp₂) ^-1
• (pr11 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone) = (pr12 cc ◃ δ) • ℓ'p₂

          exact (pr21 φ₂).
      Qed.

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(λ δδ : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
 transportf
   (λ z0 : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; hf ==>[ z0] gg')
   (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
   ((δδ ▹▹ hf)
    •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh') =
 disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh •• σσ) 
  ?pr1

          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
Lh ==>[ δ] Lh'

hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz

gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz

     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
pr122 Lh • (?α ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 cc ◃ δ) • pr122 Lh'

            
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
pr1 Lh ==> pr1 Lh'
 exact pb_lift_2cell_factor_cell.
            
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
pr122 Lh • (pb_lift_2cell_factor_cell ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 cc ◃ δ) • pr122 Lh'
 abstract
                (etrans ;
                 [ apply maponpaths ;
                   apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 Hpb)
                 | ] ;
                 rewrite !vassocr ;
                 rewrite vcomp_rinv, id2_left ;
                 apply idpath).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
c: B
cc: DD c
h, h': B ⟦ c, y ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hz
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hz
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hy ⟧
ℓp₂:= pr221 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h) (ℓ · p₂)
ℓp₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh) (pr22 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · p₁) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pb ⟧
ℓ'p₂:= pr221 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr12 cc · h') (ℓ' · p₂)
ℓ'p₁:= make_invertible_2cell
  (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible D
     (id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)) 
     (pr12 Lh') (pr22 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · p₁) (pr1 gg')
(λ δδ : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
 transportf
   (λ z0 : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; hf ==>[ z0] gg')
   (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
   ((δδ ▹▹ hf)
    •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh') =
 disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor DD hf Lh •• σσ)
  (make_disp_map_bicat_cell D
     pb_lift_2cell_factor_cell
     pb_lift_2cell_factor_subproof)
 abstract
              (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
               refine (transportf_disp_map_bicat_cell _ _ _ @ _) ;
               cbn ;
               etrans ; [ apply maponpaths_2 ; apply (pb_ump_cell_pr1 Hpb) | ] ;
               do 2 refine (vassocl _ _ _ @ _) ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               refine (_ @ id2_right _) ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               apply vcomp_linv).
      Defined.
    End LiftTwoCellFactor.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
cartesian_1cell DD hf

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
cartesian_1cell DD hf

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
∏ (c : B) (cc : DD c) (h : B ⟦ c, y ⟧)
(gg : cc -->[ h · f] hz), lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
∏ (c : B) (cc : DD c) (h h' : B ⟦ c, y ⟧)
(gg : cc -->[ h · f] hz) 
(gg' : cc -->[ h' · f] hz) 
(δ : h ==> h') (σσ : gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg')
(Lh : lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg)
(Lh' : lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'),
lift_2cell_factor DD hf σσ Lh Lh'

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
∏ (c : B) (cc : DD c) (h : B ⟦ c, y ⟧)
(gg : cc -->[ h · f] hz), lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg
 exact @pb_lift_1cell_factor.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
pb, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
p₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
Hp₂: pred_ob D p₂
Hg: pred_ob D g
Hp₁: pred_mor D p₂ g p₁
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · g) (p₂ · f)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone g f
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
hy:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂: DD y
hz:= make_disp_map_bicat_ob D g Hg: DD z
hf:= make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f p₁ Hp₁
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ): hy -->[ f] hz
∏ (c : B) (cc : DD c) (h h' : B ⟦ c, y ⟧)
(gg : cc -->[ h · f] hz) (gg' : cc -->[ h' · f] hz)
(δ : h ==> h') (σσ : gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg')
(Lh : lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg)
(Lh' : lift_1cell_factor DD hf gg'),
lift_2cell_factor DD hf σσ Lh Lh'
 exact @pb_lift_2cell_factor.
    Defined.
  End PullbackToCartesian.

  (**
   2. Global cleaving
   *)
  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
global_cleaving DD

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
global_cleaving DD

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
∑ (aa : DD x) (ff : aa -->[ f] yy),
cartesian_1cell DD ff

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
pb:= pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B
∑ (aa : DD x) (ff : aa -->[ f] yy),
cartesian_1cell DD ff

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
pb:= pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B

  (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy) · f)

Hp₁:= mor_of_pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_mor (pr1 D) (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)) (pr12 yy)
(pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₂:= pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_ob D (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂ -->[ f] yy
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
pb:= pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B
p₁:= pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy),
pr1 yy ⟧
p₂:= pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy), x ⟧
γ:= pb_cell_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): invertible_2cell
  (pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)
   · pr12 yy)
  (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy) · f)
ump:= pb_of_pred_ob_has_pb_ump D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): has_pb_ump (pb_cone_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₁:= mor_of_pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_mor (pr1 D) (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)) (pr12 yy)
(pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₂:= pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_ob D (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
B ⟦ pb, pr1 yy ⟧

pred_mor D p₂ (pr12 yy) ?Goal

x, y: B

 exact Hp₁.

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
pb:= pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B

pr1 yy ⟧
p₂:= pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy), x ⟧
γ:= pb_cell_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): invertible_2cell
  (pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)
   · pr12 yy)
  (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy) · f)

(pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₂:= pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_ob D (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
invertible_2cell (p₂ · f) (p₁ · pr12 yy)
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ).
    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
pb:= pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B
p₁:= pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy),
pr1 yy ⟧
p₂:= pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy), x ⟧
γ:= pb_cell_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): invertible_2cell
  (pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)
   · pr12 yy)
  (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy) · f)
ump:= pb_of_pred_ob_has_pb_ump D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): has_pb_ump (pb_cone_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₁:= mor_of_pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_mor (pr1 D) (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)) (pr12 yy)
(pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₂:= pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_ob D (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
(λ ff : make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂ -->[ f] yy,
 cartesian_1cell DD ff)
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor D f
     (p₁
      :
      B ⟦ pr1 (make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂),
      pr1 yy ⟧)
     (Hp₁
      :
      pred_mor D
        (pr12 (make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂))
        (pr12 yy)
        (p₁
         :
         B ⟦ pr1 (make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂),
         pr1 yy ⟧))
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ
      :
      invertible_2cell
        (pr12 (make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂) · f)
        ((p₁
          :
          B ⟦ pr1 (make_disp_map_bicat_ob D p₂ Hp₂),
          pr1 yy ⟧) · pr12 yy)))
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
yy: DD y
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
pb:= pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B
p₁:= pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy),
pr1 yy ⟧
p₂:= pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): B ⟦ pb_ob_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy), x ⟧
γ:= pb_cell_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): invertible_2cell
  (pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)
   · pr12 yy)
  (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy) · f)
ump:= pb_of_pred_ob_has_pb_ump D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy): has_pb_ump (pb_cone_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₁:= mor_of_pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_mor (pr1 D) (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)) (pr12 yy)
(pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
Hp₂:= pb_preserves_pred_ob D (pr22 yy) ump: pred_ob D (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone pb
     (pb_pr1_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy))
     (pb_pr2_of_pred_ob D (pr12 yy) f (pr22 yy)) γ)

      apply ump.
  Defined.

  (**
   3. Characterization of cartesian cells
   *)
  Section CartesianOfSFibToCartesian.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {s₁ s₂ : c₁ --> c₂}
            {α : s₁ ==> s₂}
            {t₁ : DD c₁}
            {t₂ : DD c₂}
            {ss₁ : t₁ -->[ s₁ ] t₂}
            {ss₂ : t₁ -->[ s₂ ] t₂}
            (αα : ss₁ ==>[ α ] ss₂)
            (Hαα : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)).

    Section FixSome.
      Context {h : c₁ --> c₂}
              {hh : t₁ -->[ h] t₂}
              {γ : h ==> s₁}
              (γα : hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂).

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
isaprop (∑ γγ : hh ==>[ γ] ss₁, γγ •• αα = γα)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
isaprop (∑ γγ : hh ==>[ γ] ss₁, γγ •• αα = γα)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₂ (γ • α)
∏
x
 x' : ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
      make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
        (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
           D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
      γα, iscontr (x = x')

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₂ (γ • α)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
   make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
     (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6 D
        c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) = γα)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₂ (γ • α)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
γα
φ₁ = φ₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₂ (γ • α)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
γα
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₂ (γ • α)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
γα
pr11 φ₁ = pr11 φ₂

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B

α: s₁ ==> s₂

t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂

ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂

Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)

  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
γα
pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂

c₁, c₂: B

t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂

hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =

pr1 hh · pr12 t₂ ==> pr1 ss₁ · pr12 t₂
 exact ((pr22 hh)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr22 ss₁).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₂ (γ • α)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D hh ss₁ γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
γα
pr1 γα ▹ pr12 t₂ =
(((pr22 hh) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 ss₁)
• (pr1 αα ▹ pr12 t₂)
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             refine (pr2 γα @ _) ;
             rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             exact (!(pr2 αα))).

γα
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pr12 t₂ =
((pr22 hh) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 ss₁
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             exact (pr21 φ₁)).

     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =

pr11 φ₁ • pr1 αα = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁)).

D: disp_map_bicat B

     D c₁ c₂ h s₁ s₂ γ α t₁ t₂ hh ss₁ ss₂ γγ αα) =
γα
pr11 φ₂ • pr1 αα = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂)).
      Qed.

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
hh ==>[ γ] ss₁

hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂

t₂: DD c₂

γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr122 hh • (?α ▹ pr12 t₂) = (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr122 ss₁

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr1 γα ▹ pr12 t₂ = ?δp • (pr1 αα ▹ pr12 t₂)

          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr1 hh · pr12 t₂ ==> pr1 ss₁ · pr12 t₂
 exact ((pr22 hh)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr22 ss₁).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr1 γα ▹ pr12 t₂ =
(((pr22 hh) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 ss₁)
• (pr1 αα ▹ pr12 t₂)
 abstract
              (rewrite !vassocl ;
               use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
               refine (pr2 γα @ _) ;
               rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               exact (!(pr2 αα))).

D: disp_map_bicat B

t₂: DD c₂

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂

h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr122 hh
• (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor (pr12 t₂) Hαα
     (pr1 γα)
     (((pr22 hh) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 ss₁)
     disp_map_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
   ▹ pr12 t₂) = (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr122 ss₁
 abstract
            (rewrite is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_over ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

make_disp_map_bicat_cell D

  (make_disp_map_bicat_cell D

 exact (disp_map_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_comm γα).

  End CartesianOfSFibToCartesian.

  Section CartesianOfSFibToCartesian.
    Context (HD : is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D)
            {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {s₁ s₂ : c₁ --> c₂}
            {α : s₁ ==> s₂}
            {t₁ : DD c₁}
            {t₂ : DD c₂}
            {ss₁ : t₁ -->[ s₁ ] t₂}
            {ss₂ : t₁ -->[ s₂ ] t₂}
            (αα : ss₁ ==>[ α ] ss₂)
            (Hαα : is_cartesian_2cell DD αα).

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell DD αα
internal_sfib (pr12 t₂)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell DD αα
internal_sfib (pr12 t₂)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell DD αα
pred_ob D (pr12 t₂)

      exact (pr22 t₂).
    Defined.

    Let f : pr1 t₁ --> pr1 t₂
      := internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor _ Ht₂ ((_ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂).

    Let β : f ==> pr1 ss₂
      := internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell _ Ht₂ ((_ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂).

    Let γ : invertible_2cell (f · pr12 t₂) (pr12 t₁ · s₁)
      := internal_sfib_cleaving_com _ Ht₂ ((_ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂).

    Let Hss₂ : mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)
      := pr1 (pr2 HD _ _ _ _ _ _ _) (pr12 ss₂).

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): f ==> pr1 ss₂
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): invertible_2cell (f · pr12 t₂) (pr12 t₁ · s₁)
Hss₂:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)) (pr12 ss₂): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 t₁) 
  (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)
t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B

α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂

Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): f ==> pr1 ss₂
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): invertible_2cell (f · pr12 t₂) (pr12 t₁ · s₁)

  (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ 
     (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) 
     (pr1 ss₂)) (pr12 ss₂): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 t₁) 
  (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)
pred_mor D (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) ?f

D: disp_map_bicat B

D: disp_map_bicat B

t₂: DD c₂

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 t₁ ⟧

Hδ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₁) δ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂)
  (δ
   ▹ internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
       ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂))

  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): f ==> pr1 ss₂

  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): invertible_2cell (f · pr12 t₂) (pr12 t₁ · s₁)
Hss₂:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)) (pr12 ss₂): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 t₁) 
  (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 t₁ ⟧
δ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hδ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₁) δ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) β

          apply internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian.

Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in

  (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)

  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell Hβ: is_cartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell
?Goal =
pr1
  (transportf (λ z : s₁ ==> s₂, ss₁ ==>[ z] ss₂)
     (id2_left α)
     (is_cartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'
      •• disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell))
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): f ==> pr1 ss₂
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): invertible_2cell (f · pr12 t₂) (pr12 t₁ · s₁)
Hss₂:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ 
     (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) 
     (pr1 ss₂)) (pr12 ss₂): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 t₁) 
  (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)
Hβ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell Hβ: is_cartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂) ?Goal

  (pr1 disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell)

  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell Hβ: is_cartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell

pr1
  (transportf (λ z : s₁ ==> s₂, ss₁ ==>[ z] ss₂)

t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂

  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧

  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂)

is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (is_cartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'))

          exact (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible
                   _ _ _
                   (pr2 (is_cartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'))).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): f ==> pr1 ss₂
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): invertible_2cell (f · pr12 t₂) (pr12 t₁ · s₁)
Hss₂:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)) (pr12 ss₂): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 t₁) 
  (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₂)
Hβ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian 
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr12 t₁ ◃ α) • pr22 ss₂): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell Hβ: is_cartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_cartesian_2cell_sfib_src_cell)
 apply Hβ.
    Qed.
  End CartesianOfSFibToCartesian.

  (**
   4. Characterization of opcartesian cells
   *)
  Section OpCartesianOfSOpFibToOpCartesian.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {s₁ s₂ : c₁ --> c₂}
            {α : s₁ ==> s₂}
            {t₁ : DD c₁}
            {t₂ : DD c₂}
            {ss₁ : t₁ -->[ s₁ ] t₂}
            {ss₂ : t₁ -->[ s₂ ] t₂}
            (αα : ss₁ ==>[ α ] ss₂)
            (Hαα : is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)).

    Section FixSome.
      Context {h : c₁ --> c₂}
              {hh : t₁ -->[ h ] t₂}
              {γ : s₂ ==> h}
              (γα : ss₁ ==>[ α • γ ] hh).

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
isaprop (∑ γγ : ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh, αα •• γγ = γα)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
isaprop (∑ γγ : ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh, αα •• γγ = γα)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)
∏
x
 x' : ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₂ hh γ,
      make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
        (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
           D c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) =
      γα, iscontr (x = x')

D: disp_map_bicat B

s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₂ hh γ,
   make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
     (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6 D
        c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) = γα)
