B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₂ hh γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) =
γα
pr1 ss₂ · pr12 t₂ ==> pr1 hh · pr12 t₂
 exact ((pr22 ss₂)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr22 hh).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₂ hh γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) =
γα
pr1 γα ▹ pr12 t₂ =
(pr1 αα ▹ pr12 t₂)
• (((pr22 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 hh)
 abstract
            (use (vcomp_lcancel (pr22 ss₁)) ; [ apply (pr22 ss₁) | ] ;
            rewrite !vassocr ;
            refine (pr2 γα @ _) ;
            apply maponpaths_2 ;
            rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
            apply maponpaths_2 ;
            refine (!_) ;
            refine (maponpaths (λ z, z • _) (pr2 αα) @ _) ;
            rewrite !vassocl ;
            rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
            rewrite id2_right ;
            apply idpath).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₁
t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂
ss₁: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₁
ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₂ hh γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) =
γα
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pr12 t₂ =
((pr22 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 hh
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             exact (pr21 φ₁)).

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂

t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂

ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)

make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) =
γα
pr1 αα • pr11 φ₁ = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁)).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B

c₁, c₂: B

t₂: disp_map_bicat_ob D c₂

ss₂: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ s₂
αα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ ss₂ α
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor D t₁ t₂ h
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₁ hh (α • γ)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γγ : disp_map_bicat_cell D ss₂ hh γ,
make_disp_map_bicat_cell D (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ)
  (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops_subproof6
     D c₁ c₂ s₁ s₂ h α γ t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ hh αα γγ) =
γα
pr1 αα • pr11 φ₂ = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂)).
      Qed.

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B

α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂

Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh

 exact ((pr22 ss₂)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr22 hh).
          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
pr1 γα ▹ pr12 t₂ =
(pr1 αα ▹ pr12 t₂)
• (((pr22 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 hh)
 abstract
              (use (vcomp_lcancel (pr22 ss₁)) ; [ apply (pr22 ss₁) | ] ;
               rewrite !vassocr ;
               refine (pr2 γα @ _) ;
               apply maponpaths_2 ;
               rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
               apply maponpaths_2 ;
               refine (!_) ;
               refine (maponpaths (λ z, z • _) (pr2 αα) @ _) ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
               rewrite id2_right ;
               apply idpath).
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂

h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
pr122 ss₂
• (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor (pr12 t₂) Hαα
     (pr1 γα)
     (((pr22 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 hh)
     disp_map_is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
   ▹ pr12 t₂) = (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr122 hh
 abstract
            (rewrite is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor_over ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_cell D

      • is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor (pr12 t₂)

x: pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh
isaprop
  (pr122 ss₁ • (x ▹ pr12 t₂) =
   (pr12 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr122 hh)

          apply cellset_property.

pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_cell D
     (pr1 αα
      • is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor (pr12 t₂)
          Hαα (pr1 γα)
          (((pr22 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr22 hh)

        disp_map_is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell_cell)) =

        apply is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor_comm.
      Qed.
    End FixSome.

αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂

h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
∑ γγ : ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh, αα •• γγ = γα

    Defined.
  End OpCartesianOfSOpFibToOpCartesian.

  Section OpCartesianOfSOpFibToOpCartesian.
    Context (HD : is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D)
            {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {s₁ s₂ : c₁ --> c₂}
            {α : s₁ ==> s₂}
            {t₁ : DD c₁}
            {t₂ : DD c₂}
            {ss₁ : t₁ -->[ s₁ ] t₂}
            {ss₂ : t₁ -->[ s₂ ] t₂}
            (αα : ss₁ ==>[ α ] ss₂)
            (Hαα : is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα).

pred_ob D (pr12 t₂)

      exact (pr22 t₂).
    Defined.

    Let f : pr1 t₁ --> pr1 t₂
      := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor _ Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁)^-1 • (_ ◃ α)).

    Let β : pr1 ss₁ ==> f
      := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell _ Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁)^-1 • (_ ◃ α)).

    Let γ : invertible_2cell (pr12 t₁ · s₂) (f · pr12 t₂)
      := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com _ Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁)^-1 • (_ ◃ α)).

    Let Hss₁ : mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)
      := pr1 (pr2 HD _ _ _ _ _ _ _) (pr12 ss₁).

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B

Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sopfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): pr1 ss₁ ==> f
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 t₁ · s₂) (f · pr12 t₂)
Hss₁:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)) (pr12 ss₁): mor_preserves_opcartesian 
  (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)
t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂

          (cbn ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths ;
             apply internal_sopfib_opcleaving_over

           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           apply idpath).

               (pr12 t₂)
               (pr1 disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell)
      := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_is_opcartesian _ Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁)^-1 • (_ ◃ α)).

D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B

t₂: DD c₂

αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in

     (pr1 ss₁)) (pr12 ss₁): mor_preserves_opcartesian 
  (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)
Hβ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_is_opcartesian
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib 
  (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell Hβ: is_opcartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib 
  (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 (is_opcartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'))

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sopfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): pr1 ss₁ ==> f
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 t₁ · s₂) (f · pr12 t₂)
Hss₁:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)) (pr12 ss₁): mor_preserves_opcartesian 
  (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)
Hβ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_is_opcartesian
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib 
  (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell Hβ: is_opcartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell)
 apply Hβ.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sopfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): pr1 ss₁ ==> f
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 t₁ · s₂) (f · pr12 t₂)
Hss₁:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)) (pr12 ss₁): mor_preserves_opcartesian 
  (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)
Hβ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_is_opcartesian
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib 
  (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell Hβ: is_opcartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 (is_opcartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'))
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: DD c₁
t₂: DD c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
Ht₂:= let X := pr1 HD in
X (pr1 t₂) c₂ (pr12 t₂) (pr22 t₂): internal_sopfib (pr12 t₂)
f:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): pr1 ss₁ ==> f
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 t₂) Ht₂
  ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 t₁ · s₂) (f · pr12 t₂)
Hss₁:= pr1 (pr2 HD (pr1 t₁) (pr1 t₂) c₁ c₂ (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)) (pr12 ss₁): mor_preserves_opcartesian 
  (pr12 t₁) (pr12 t₂) (pr1 ss₁)
Hβ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_is_opcartesian
  (pr12 t₂) Ht₂ ((pr22 ss₁) ^-1 • (pr12 t₁ ◃ α)): is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib 
  (pr12 t₂)
  (pr1 disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell)
Hβ':= disp_map_is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell Hβ: is_opcartesian_2cell DD
  disp_map_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_src_cell
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (is_opcartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'))

          exact (is_disp_invertible_to_is_invertible
                   _ _ _
                   (pr2 (is_opcartesian_2cell_unique_iso Hαα Hβ'))).
    Qed.
  End OpCartesianOfSOpFibToOpCartesian.

  (**
   5. Local cleaving
   *)
  Section LocalCleaving.
    Context (HD : is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D).

    Section LocalLift.
      Context {x y : B}
              {xx : DD x}
              {yy : DD y}
              {f g : x --> y}
              (gg : xx -->[ g ] yy)
              (α : f ==> g).

      Let H : internal_sfib (pr12 yy) := pr1 HD _ _ _ (pr22 yy).

      Let ff : pr1 xx --> pr1 yy
        := internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor _ H ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg).

      Let β : ff ==> pr1 gg
        := internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg).

      Let γ : invertible_2cell (ff · pr12 yy) (pr12 xx · f)
        := internal_sfib_cleaving_com
                 (pr12 yy)
                 H
                 ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg).

      Let Hgg : mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
        := pr1 (pr2 HD _ _ _ _ _ _ _) (pr12 gg).

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sfib (pr12 yy)
ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): invertible_2cell (ff · pr12 yy) (pr12 xx · f)
Hgg:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
pred_mor D (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) ff

  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧

  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 yy) H

Hgg:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
pred_mor D (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) ff

     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 xx ⟧
δ: h₁ ==> h₂

is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (δ ▹ ff)

          apply internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian.

D: disp_map_bicat B

HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

α: f ==> g

Hδ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 xx) δ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₂ ◃ β)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₁ ◃ β)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (δ ▹ ff)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sfib (pr12 yy)
ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): invertible_2cell (ff · pr12 yy) (pr12 xx · f)
Hgg:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 xx ⟧
δ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hδ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 xx) δ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₂ ◃ β)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₁ ◃ β)

δ: h₁ ==> h₂

H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₂ ◃ β)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) β

          apply internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian.

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sfib (pr12 yy)
ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): invertible_2cell (ff · pr12 yy) (pr12 xx · f)
Hgg:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 xx ⟧
δ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hδ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 xx) δ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₂ ◃ β)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (h₁ ◃ β)
H₃: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr12 yy) (δ ▹ pr1 gg)
(δ ▹ ff) • (h₂ ◃ β) = (h₁ ◃ β) • (δ ▹ pr1 gg)

        abstract
          (rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
           apply idpath).
      Defined.

α: f ==> g

ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧

  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg

  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧

     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)

  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧

pred_mor D (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) ff
 exact local_cleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_cartesian.
        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sfib (pr12 yy)
ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): invertible_2cell (ff · pr12 yy) (pr12 xx · f)
Hgg:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
invertible_2cell (pr12 xx · f) (ff · pr12 yy)
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sfib (pr12 yy)
ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): ff ==> pr1 gg
γ:= internal_sfib_cleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): invertible_2cell (ff · pr12 yy) (pr12 xx · f)
Hgg:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
local_cleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_lift ==>[ α] gg

B: bicat

HD: is_contravariant_disp_map_bicat D

α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sfib (pr12 yy)
ff:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧

     (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)) (pr12 gg): mor_preserves_cartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 gg)
pr122 local_cleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_lift
• (internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
     ((pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr22 gg) ▹ pr12 yy) =
(pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr122 gg
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               apply internal_sfib_cleaving_over
             | ] ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite vcomp_linv ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.
    End LocalLift.

yy: DD y
zz: DD z

h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

  Qed.

  (**
   6. Local opcleaving
   *)
  Section LocalOpCleaving.
    Context (HD : is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D).

    Section LocalLift.
      Context {x y : B}
              {xx : DD x}
              {yy : DD y}
              {f g : x --> y}
              (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
              (α : f ==> g).

      Let H : internal_sopfib (pr12 yy) := pr1 HD _ _ _ (pr22 yy).

      Let gg : pr1 xx --> pr1 yy
        := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor _ H ((pr22 ff)^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)).

      Let β : pr1 ff ==> gg
        := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell _ H ((pr22 ff)^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)).

      Let γ : invertible_2cell
                (pr12 xx · g)
                (gg · pr12 yy)
        := internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com _ H ((pr22 ff)^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)).

      Let Hff : mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)
        := pr1 (pr2 HD _ _ _ _ _ _ _) (pr12 ff).

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sopfib (pr12 yy)
gg:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): pr1 ff ==> gg
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 xx · g) (gg · pr12 yy)
Hff:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)) (pr12 ff): mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)
pred_mor D (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) gg

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sopfib (pr12 yy)
gg:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): pr1 ff ==> gg
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 xx · g) (gg · pr12 yy)
Hff:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)) (pr12 ff): mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)
pred_mor D (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) gg

γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 xx · g) (gg · pr12 yy)
Hff:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)) (pr12 ff): mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 xx ⟧
δ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hδ: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 xx) δ
H₁: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (h₂ ◃ β)
H₂: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (h₁ ◃ β)
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (δ ▹ pr1 ff)

          
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sopfib (pr12 yy)
gg:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): pr1 ff ==> gg
γ:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_com (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): invertible_2cell (pr12 xx · g) (gg · pr12 yy)
Hff:= pr1
  (pr2 HD (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) x y (pr12 xx)
     (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)) (pr12 ff): mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 xx ⟧
δ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hδ: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 xx) δ
H₁: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (h₂ ◃ β)
H₂: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (h₁ ◃ β)
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 xx) δ

          exact Hδ.

  (δ ▹ pr1 ff)
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (δ ▹ gg)

        
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
H:= pr1 HD (pr1 yy) y (pr12 yy) (pr22 yy): internal_sopfib (pr12 yy)
gg:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧
β:= internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): pr1 ff ==> gg

     (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)) (pr12 ff): mor_preserves_opcartesian (pr12 xx) (pr12 yy) (pr1 ff)
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, pr1 xx ⟧

H₂: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (h₁ ◃ β)
H₃: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy)
  (δ ▹ pr1 ff)
(h₁ ◃ β) • (δ ▹ gg) = (δ ▹ pr1 ff) • (h₂ ◃ β)

        abstract
          (rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
           apply idpath).
      Defined.

B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

α: f ==> g

  ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)): B ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧

pr122 ff
• (internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_cell (pr12 yy) H
     ((pr22 ff) ^-1 • (pr12 xx ◃ α)) ▹ pr12 yy) =
(pr12 xx ◃ α)
• pr122 local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_lift
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               apply internal_sopfib_opcleaving_over
             | ] ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.
    End LocalLift.

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
local_opcleaving DD

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
local_opcleaving DD

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
opcartesian_lift_2cell DD ff α

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
xx -->[ g] yy
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
ff ==>[ α] ?pr1
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
(λ αα : ff ==>[ α] ?pr1, is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα)
  ?pr10

      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
xx -->[ g] yy
 exact (local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_lift ff α).
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
ff ==>[
α] local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_lift ff α
 exact (local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_cell ff α).
      
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
(λ αα : ff ==>[
        α] local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_lift ff
             α, is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα)
  (local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_cell ff α)
 
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
α: f ==> g
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy)
  (pr1 (local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat_cell ff α))

        apply internal_sopfib_opcleaving_is_opcartesian.
    Defined.
  End LocalOpCleaving.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
local_iso_cleaving DD

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
local_iso_cleaving DD

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
local_opcleaving DD

    exact (local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat HD).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
lwhisker_opcartesian DD

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
lwhisker_opcartesian DD

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell DD (hh ◃◃ αα)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (pr1 (hh ◃◃ αα))

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (pr1 αα)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
 exact HD.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
w, x, y: B
ww: DD w
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
h: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: ww -->[ h] xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
 exact H.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
rwhisker_opcartesian DD

  
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
rwhisker_opcartesian DD

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell DD (αα ▹▹ hh)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 zz) (pr1 (αα ▹▹ hh))

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr12 yy) (pr1 αα)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα

    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
 apply HD.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_map_bicat B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
HD: is_covariant_disp_map_bicat D
x, y, z: B
xx: DD x
yy: DD y
zz: DD z
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
is_opcartesian_2cell DD αα
 exact H.
  Qed.
End DispMapBicatCleaving.

(**
 7. Specialized to internal Street (op)fibrations
 *)
Section StreetFibs.
  Context (B : bicat_with_pb).

  Definition global_cleaving_sfib
    : global_cleaving (cod_sfibs B)
    := global_cleaving_of_disp_map_bicat (sfib_disp_map_bicat B).

  Definition local_cleaving_sfib
    : local_cleaving (cod_sfibs B)
    := local_cleaving_of_disp_map_bicat
         (sfib_disp_map_bicat B)
         (sfib_disp_map_bicat_is_contravariant B).

  Definition lwhisker_cartesian_sfib
    : lwhisker_cartesian (cod_sfibs B)
    := lwhisker_cartesian_disp_map_bicat
         (sfib_disp_map_bicat B)
         (sfib_disp_map_bicat_is_contravariant B).

  Definition rwhisker_cartesian_sfib
    : rwhisker_cartesian (cod_sfibs B)
    := rwhisker_cartesian_disp_map_bicat
         (sfib_disp_map_bicat B)
         (sfib_disp_map_bicat_is_contravariant B).

  Definition global_cleaving_sopfib
    : global_cleaving (cod_sfibs B)
    := global_cleaving_of_disp_map_bicat (sfib_disp_map_bicat B).

  Definition local_opcleaving_sopfib
    : local_opcleaving (cod_sopfibs B)
    := local_opcleaving_of_disp_map_bicat
         (sopfib_disp_map_bicat B)
         (sopfib_disp_map_bicat_is_covariant B).

  Definition lwhisker_opcartesian_sopfib
    : lwhisker_opcartesian (cod_sopfibs B)
    := lwhisker_opcartesian_disp_map_bicat
         (sopfib_disp_map_bicat B)
         (sopfib_disp_map_bicat_is_covariant B).

  Definition rwhisker_opcartesian_sopfib
    : rwhisker_opcartesian (cod_sopfibs B)
    := rwhisker_opcartesian_disp_map_bicat
         (sopfib_disp_map_bicat B)
         (sopfib_disp_map_bicat_is_covariant B).
End StreetFibs.
